Goal: STRENGTH
Experience: ADVANCED
Location: GYM

=== WEEK 1 ===

Day 1:
Warm-up:
  - 5-10 min dynamic mobility
  - Movement prep specific to today's patterns

Main Work:
  - Push-up: 4 x 5-6, rest 90-120s
  - Pike push-up: 4 x 5-6, rest 90-120s
  - Accessory: Hammer curl: 3 x 12-15 reps

Cool-down:
  - 5 min light cardio
  - Static stretching 5-10 min

Day 2:
Warm-up:
  - 5-10 min dynamic mobility
  - Movement prep specific to today's patterns

Main Work:
  - Inverted row: 4 x 5-6, rest 90-120s
  - Pull-up: 4 x 5-6, rest 90-120s
  - Accessory: Tricep pushdown: 3 x 12-15 reps

Cool-down:
  - 5 min light cardio
  - Static stretching 5-10 min

Day 3:
Warm-up:
  - 5-10 min dynamic mobility
  - Movement prep specific to today's patterns

Main Work:
  - Goblet squat: 4 x 5-6, rest 90-120s
  - Conventional deadlift: 4 x 5-6, rest 90-120s
  - Plank: 3 x 45s
  - Accessory: Overhead tricep extension: 3 x 12-15 reps

Cool-down:
  - 5 min light cardio
  - Static stretching 5-10 min

- Track all workouts and progressively increase weight/reps

- Listen to your body - scale back if needed
